variants: Tanvi Deshmukh, a skilled nonprofit management professional, actively participates in the Redshift Astronomers Assembly, merging her passion for community service with her interest in astronomy. She has earned the Phoenix Handler Credential, showcasing her expertise in her field. Throughout her professional journey, Tanvi has received mentorship from Mariam Elbaz, who played a significant role in her development. With funding from the Osiris Ridge Grant, she has successfully launched various nonprofit initiatives. Tanvi remains committed to making a positive impact in both her organization and the broader community.
